title: The Road to Sabaody: Key Exchange
description: In the Sabaody Archipelago storyline, this section centers on Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Unknown person #2 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Brook
dialogue.text: So I don't have any eyes!!! YoHoho!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Would you like to try one?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Are you going to buy any- thing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: It's easy to make a hotel here.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: That's how these round buildings are made.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: Ah! Is that a shopping mall!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: You guys made lots of great memories!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Huh? Where did Nami and Robin go?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #17
dialogue.text: ... I wonder what's wrong with her.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: She's had some bad experiences here...?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: PLEASE!!! I'm begging you, anybody!!! Help me!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I've given up on the "new world"!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I just want to go home... Please!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: He doesn't even know my face!!!

summary: This scene advances the Sabaody Archipelago conflict through Brook, Unknown person #1, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, focusing on the immediate stakes of the road to sabaody: key exchange.
